---
title: "Architecture"
---

Bharat Market Pulse keeps responsibilities separated:

- `src/bharat_market_pulse/` — Python application logic
- `docs/` — Quarto documentation site
- `tests/` — deterministic test suite

## Pipeline stages

1. Portfolio extraction (Agent JSON → LLM → OCR fallback)
2. Source fetch (official/news/social, with graceful degradation)
3. Analysis and action generation
4. Swarm sandbox overlay
5. Report export (`.md`, `.csv`, `.json`, Telegram digest)
